<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep this short. -->

## What & why
<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? Link the issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `feat` — new feature / package / pattern
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` / `refactor` / `chore`

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass: `python tests/teste_v2.py` (107/107)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Updated docs affected by this change — `README.md`, `README.pt-BR.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `docs/MANUAL_YAML_REFERENCIA.yaml`, `schemas/component.schema.json`, `.agents/skills/**/SKILL.md` (see the "documentation discipline" rule in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] For a new package/pattern: added a preset in `modulos_config/_preset_*.yaml`

## Screenshots / generated output
<!-- For footprint/symbol/3D changes, show the before/after or the generated file. -->
